zh.Kennerleigh, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文肯納利
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne於大約1515年出生在英國戴文肯恩。她於大約1534年與Sir Knight Richard Waltham在英國戴文肯恩結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年在英國戴文阿可明斯特享年52歲。

zh-hans.Kennerleigh, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文肯納利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne于大约1515年出生在英国戴文肯恩。她于大约1534年与Sir Knight Richard Waltham在英国戴文肯恩结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年在英国戴文阿可明斯特享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pangborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pangbourne (Berks), which is recorded as (at) Pægeinge burnan in a 13th-century copy of a document from 844 and Pangeborne in 1086. The placename means ‘spring or stream of the people of a man named Pǣga’, from the Old English personal name Pǣga + the group name suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne was born about 1515, in Kenn, Devon, England. She married Sir Knight Richard Waltham about 1534, in Kenn, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1566, in Axminster, Devon, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne est née environ 1515, à Kenn, Devon, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Knight Richard Waltham environ 1534, à Kenn, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1566, à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne wurde um 1515 in Kenn, Devon, England geboren. Sie hat um 1534 in Kenn, Devon, England Sir Knight Richard Waltham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1566 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Axminster, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne è nata il circa 1515 nel Kenn, Devon, England. Lei sposato Sir Knight Richard Waltham circa 1534, nel Kenn, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1566, nel Axminster, Devon, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Kennerleigh, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボンケネルレイグ
ja.Kenn,Devon,England: イギリスイギリスデボンケン
ja.Axminster, Devon, England: イギリスデボンアクスミンスター
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborneは約1515年にイギリスデボンケンで生まれた。約1534年にイギリスデボンケンでSir Knight Richard Walthamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年にイギリスデボンアクスミンスターで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne(은)는 대략 1515년 영국 데폰 켄에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1534년 영국 데폰 켄에서 Sir Knight Richard Waltham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 영국 데폰 액민스터에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne nasceu aproximadamente 1515, em Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Sir Knight Richard Waltham aproximadamente 1534, em Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1566, em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne родилась около 1515 г. в местности кенн, девон, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Knight Richard Waltham около 1534 г. в местности кенн, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1566 г. в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pangborne nació aproximadamente 1515, en Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra. Se casó con Sir Knight Richard Waltham aproximadamente 1534, en Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1566, en Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
